userStories.title: Fix forward algorithm transmat direction (C-1)
userStories.description: hmm_engine.predict_filtered multiplies by transpose of transition matrix, yielding sum over i of alpha[i]*T[j,i] instead of alpha[i]*T[i,j]. Replace with non-transposed form and add regression test against hmmlearn predict_proba on an asymmetric transition matrix.
acceptanceCriteria: shared/core/hmm/hmm_engine.py uses log(model.transmat_ + 1e-300) (NOT transposed) in forward step
tests/hmm/test_hmm_engine.py contains a test that sets up an asymmetric transmat and verifies predict_filtered matches hmmlearn reference within tolerance
All existing tests in tests/hmm/test_hmm_engine.py still pass
Ruff clean on shared/core/hmm/hmm_engine.py

userStories.title: Harden predict_filtered numerics and error handling (H-6, H-7)
userStories.description: Add input validation (shape/finiteness), reset stale prior on n_components mismatch, replace log(det(cov)) with slogdet, catch both np.linalg.LinAlgError and scipy.linalg.LinAlgError, and wrap the tied branch in try/except. Move scipy.linalg.solve to module top.
acceptanceCriteria: scipy.linalg.solve imported at module top, not inside per-bar loop
predict_filtered validates feature_vector shape against model.n_features and raises ValueError on mismatch or non-finite entries
Stale _previous_proba (wrong n_components) auto-resets with a WARNING log
log_det uses np.linalg.slogdet with sign guard; negative/zero sign sets log_emission to -inf
Both full and tied branches catch both np.linalg.LinAlgError and scipy.linalg.LinAlgError
tests/hmm/test_hmm_engine.py has tests for NaN input and wrong-shape input (both raise ValueError)

userStories.title: Reset inference state after train and add convergence preference in BIC (H-5, H-8)
userStories.description: Call reset_inference_state at tail of train. Log each candidate convergence status; prefer converged models in BIC tie-breaking and fall back to best non-converged only if none converged.
acceptanceCriteria: train() calls reset_inference_state() before returning
Each candidate's hmm.monitor_.converged status is logged
When at least one candidate is converged, only converged candidates are eligible as best model
When no candidate converges, best non-converged is used with a WARNING
All prior tests still pass

userStories.title: Migrate strategies to emit spec-shaped Signal with leverage override on uncertainty (H-1, H-2)
userStories.description: Strategies must return Signal (spec shape) rather than StrategySignal. Uncertainty mode must halve position_size_pct AND force leverage to 1.0x.
acceptanceCriteria: BaseRegimeStrategy.generate_signal returns Signal (spec dataclass)

Signal carries symbol, direction, confidence, entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit, position_size_pct, leverage, regime_id, regime_name, regime_probability, timestamp, reasoning, strategy_name, metadata
LowVolBullStrategy emits leverage=1.25, position_size_pct<=0.95
MidVolCautiousStrategy emits leverage=1.0, position_size_pct 0.95 (trend intact) or 0.60 (trend broken)
HighVolDefensiveStrategy emits leverage=1.0, position_size_pct<=0.60
StrategyOrchestrator.should_enter_position halves position_size_pct AND forces leverage=1.0 under uncertainty

userStories.title: Add LABEL_TO_STRATEGY dict and fix ADX plus/minus DM contamination (H-3, H-4)
userStories.description: Publish LABEL_TO_STRATEGY dict keyed by every possible regime label. Rewrite ADX plus/minus DM from raw high/low series so both masked series are derived before either is mutated.
acceptanceCriteria: regime_strategies.LABEL_TO_STRATEGY dict is importable and maps BEAR/NEUTRAL/BULL/CRASH/EUPHORIA/STRONG_BEAR/WEAK_BEAR/WEAK_BULL/STRONG_BULL to strategy classes
LABEL_TO_STRATEGY exported from shared.core.hmm __init__
feature_engineering.compute_adx computes both masks from raw plus/minus dm before assigning back
Test verifies both plus and minus DM are never simultaneously non-zero on the same bar

userStories.title: Add tests/hmm/test_look_ahead.py — slice OHLCV, not features
userStories.description: Create file-level look-ahead test per HMM.md mandate. Slice raw OHLCV before recomputing features on each slice and verify regime at bar T is identical.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/hmm/test_look_ahead.py exists
Test slices OHLCV at T and T+N, recomputes features from scratch for each slice, compares regime at bar T
Test also ensures feature values at T are identical for the two slices
Test passes on current engine

userStories.title: Add tests/hmm/test_hmm_strategy.py
userStories.description: Strategy-layer test file covering vol-rank mapping, uncertainty halving + leverage clamp, 10% rebalancing threshold with zero-to-zero no-op guard, LABEL_TO_STRATEGY resolution, and update_regime_infos re-mapping after retrain.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/hmm/test_hmm_strategy.py exists and covers: vol-rank to strategy mapping for 3/4/5 regime cases
Test verifies uncertainty mode halves position size and forces leverage=1.0
Test verifies needs_rebalance returns False when target==0.0 and last==0.0
Test verifies needs_rebalance returns True when pct_change exceeds 10%
Test verifies LABEL_TO_STRATEGY resolves labels to correct strategy classes
All tests pass

userStories.title: Medium fixes: rebalance no-op, RSI double z-score, bar timestamp, high_low_range cleanup
userStories.description: Guard needs_rebalance from zero-to-zero churn; drop the in-feature rsi_zscore column (normalize_features already z-scores everything); thread bar timestamp into predict_filtered and RegimeState; remove dead high_low_range column.
acceptanceCriteria: needs_rebalance returns False when target and last are both zero
feature_engineering does not emit both rsi and rsi_zscore columns simultaneously; normalize handles z-score once
predict_filtered accepts an optional timestamp kwarg and uses it for RegimeState.timestamp; defaults to datetime.now()
compute_features does not leave dead high_low_range in the DataFrame (remove or include in hmm_features)

userStories.title: Full quality gate: ruff, ty, pytest
userStories.description: All targeted files pass ruff and ty; all hmm tests pass.
acceptanceCriteria: uv run ruff check shared/core/hmm tests/hmm exits 0
uv run ruff format --check shared/core/hmm tests/hmm exits 0
uv run ty check shared/core/hmm tests/hmm reports 0 errors on in-scope code
uv run pytest tests/hmm -q shows all tests passing
No regressions in existing tests
